name: codex-profile-manager
description: Desktop utility for creating isolated Codex App windows with separate API provider profiles.

scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.dev: npm run build:main && concurrently -k "tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --watch" "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.package:mac:arm64: npm run build:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --mac zip dir --arm64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:mac:arm64:dir: npm run build:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --mac dir --arm64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:mac:arm64:dmg: npm run build:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg --arm64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:mac:x64: npm run build:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --mac zip dir --x64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:mac:x64:dir: npm run build:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --mac dir --x64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:mac:universal: npm run build:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --mac zip dir --universal --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:win: npm run build && electron-builder --win portable --x64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:win:dir: npm run build && electron-builder --win dir --x64 --config electron-builder.yml

author: Modi
